india_trends.title: NABARD acquires leasehold rights to MTNL’s BKC campus in Rs 351 crore deal
india_trends.summary: NABARD has made waves by securing a prestigious commercial site in Mumbai’s vibrant Bandra-Kurla Complex. The development-focused institution acquired leasehold rights from MTNL for more than 350 crore rupees, which includes two significant structures on a substantial land parcel.

india_trends.title: Tata Steel Q4 Results: Cons PAT soars 147% YoY to Rs 2,965 crore, revenue jumps 13%
india_trends.summary: Tata Steel Q4 Results: Tata Steel reported a consolidated net profit of Rs 2,965 crore in the March-ended quarter versus Rs 1,201 crore in the year ago period, a 147% YoY growth.

india_trends.summary: Tata Steel Q4 Results: The profit after tax (PAT) stood at ₹2,965 crore as against ₹1,200.88 crore in the same period a year ago.

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock Standard Engineering edges higher despite stock market sell-off
india_trends.summary: On May 15, Standard Engineering Technology stock rose 1.75% to ₹136.60, reflecting strong Q4FY26 and FY26 performance. Total income surged 34.97% YoY, with notable profit growth, despite recent declines in share prices due to heavy selling pressure since September 2025.
